title: groov e WAVE Wireless Speaker - Portable Travel Speaker with Bluetooth Connectivity - 8 Hours Audio Playback, Rechargeable Battery, Voice Assistant - Grey

features: WAVE WIRELESS SPEAKER - Whether you're at home, outside or on holiday, always keep the music flowing with the Groov-e Wave, a rechargeable and portable Bluetooth speaker that offers a convenient sound experience with exceptional clarity

EXCEPTIONAL SOUND - Fall in love with your favourite songs all over again with the help of the 3W speakers that help the portable speaker blast crisp and clear sound for an unparalleled audio experience at home, outdoors or on the go

8HRS OF AUDIO PLAYBACK - The Wave comes with a built-in rechargeable 1200mAh battery that gives you an impressive 8 hours of wireless music playback. Once you're out of juice, just plug in the included micro-USB charging cable

BLUETOOTH CONNECTIVITY - Built with Bluetooth, the Wave can connect to any compatible device within the wireless range to easily begin streaming music. Simply connect, hit play, and enjoy the sounds of your choice

VOICE ASSISTANT - Nothing beats simplicity, take control of your audio with the 4 easy-press buttons, or shake things up and take advantage of the fully integrated voice assistant that helps you control the portable speaker without lifting a finger
